'''hadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:palacewards|palacewards]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:palacewards|palacewards]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hadhate|hadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hadhatesher|hadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhatesherĂ«m|hadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hadhatero|hadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hadhateshĂ«|hadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhateshĂ«m|hadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihadhatero|gokihadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihadhateshĂ«|gokihadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadhateshĂ«m|gokihadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohadhankerom|gohadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohadhankeshĂ«|gohadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadhankeshĂ«m|gohadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohadhankeya|gohadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hadhaterom|hadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhatemu|hadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hadhateya|hadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihadhaterom|gokihadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadhatemu|gokihadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihadhateya|gokihadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hadhadhate|hadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hadhadhatesher|hadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhadhatesherĂ«m|hadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hadhadhatero|hadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hadhadhateshĂ«|hadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhadhateshĂ«m|hadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihadhadhatero|gokihadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihadhadhateshĂ«|gokihadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadhadhateshĂ«m|gokihadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohadhadhankerom|gohadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohadhadhankeshĂ«|gohadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadhadhankeshĂ«m|gohadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohadhadhankeya|gohadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hadhadhaterom|hadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhadhatemu|hadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hadhadhateya|hadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihadhadhaterom|gokihadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadhadhatemu|gokihadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihadhadhateya|gokihadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠdhĂŠte|hĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠdhĂŠtesher|hĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠdhĂŠtero|hĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokihĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠdhĂŠteya|hĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokihĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafdhafte|hafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafdhaftesher|hafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafdhaftesherĂ«m|hafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafdhaftero|hafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafdhafteshĂ«|hafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafdhafteshĂ«m|hafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafdhaftero|gokihafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafdhafteshĂ«|gokihafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafdhafteshĂ«m|gokihafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafdhafnkerom|gohafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafdhafnkeshĂ«|gohafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gohafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafdhafnkeya|gohafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafdhafterom|hafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafdhaftemu|hafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafdhafteya|hafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafdhafterom|gokihafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafdhaftemu|gokihafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafdhafteya|gokihafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
